results.title: “From what I’m told” – Insider drop exciting Tottenham update as Spurs agree fee for marquee signing
results.description: Tottenham and Manchester City have a basic agreement in place for the highly anticipated transfer of Brazilian winger Savinho to North London. Following a grueling campaign where Spurs narrowly preserved their Premier League status on the final day, the club’s hierarchy has aggressively backed manager Roberto De Zerbi in the transfer market. results.title: Lawsuit seeks to halt UFC Freedom 250 event on White House lawn
results.description: The lawsuit calls the plan to host the UFC card on the White House grounds “deeply corrupt."

results.title: Tigers' Tarik Skubal shines in first rehab start but offers no update on timeline
results.description: Detroit Tigers ace Tarik Skubal made his first rehab start on Sunday and threw five dominant innings for High-A West Michigan. He allowed just two hits, struck out six and threw 44 of his 54 pitches for strikes against Dayton.

results.title: applausi a cobolli ma il re è zverev
results.description: Il romano lotta cinque set, poi concede il primo titolo Slam in carriera al tedesco
